title: Structured Analytics Input Contract
description: Defines the interface contract for a future /structured-analytics backend. Phase 2 of /architect outputs this contract file so downstream analytics skills know what data is available and what analyses are expected.

generated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this contract was generated.

manifest.description: Absolute path to the manifest.json file from Phase 1.

input.description: JSON path expression describing which manifest fields this analysis reads.

expected_output.description: Human-readable description of what the analysis should return.

note.description: Human-readable note about the contract's purpose and status.
